name: derekhsu529--news-briefing
description: Real-time AI news briefing for any topic. Say "给我看大谷翔平的新闻" or "AI今天有什么大新闻", and your agent instantly searches the web, summarizes the top stories in Chinese, and delivers a rich Feishu card with AI-powered deep insights — all collapsed cleanly for mobile reading. Trigger phrases: "看下XXX新闻", "查一下XXX最新动态", "XXX有什么新闻", "帮我追踪XXX", "briefing on XXX", "给我XXX的情报"
